A '''marsh haunt''' was a [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-[[Force-sensitive/Legends|using]] red-eyed creature.

==Biology==
The marsh haunt had dull, peeling, [[Color/Legends|gray-green]] skin, camouflaging it in the swampy terrains in which it primarily lived. Its bipedal stance and skull set deeply between its shoulders gave its silhouette the appearance of a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] lacking a head. Marsh haunts would occasionally leave their swampy homes to scavenge and acquire small prey in civilized areas. While non-[[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], they worked in loose packs of two to eight creatures to ambush prey, with some of them using their [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] to scare potential prey toward the rest.<ref name="POTJ" />

==History==
Though they were native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Abraxin]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]], they could be found on many worlds in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].
